body:
This PR adds a convenience function `PressureField(model)` that returns a `ComputedField` representing total pressure, with data stored by default in the hydrostatic pressure field.

It also adds tests for using `AveragedField`s and `ComputedField`s in operations, and fixes a method ambiguity associated with deducing interpolation to `Nothing` locations.
title: PressureField and tests for AveragedFields and ComputedFields in operations
